constraints.message: Price per person cannot be negative

constraints.name: positiveCost

constraints.message: Max prep lead days must be >= min prep lead days

constraints.name: validSeasonMonths
constraints.message: Season months must be between 0 and 12

value.value: Cannot update pricing on a deactivated dish
Price per person cannot be negative
Cost per person cannot be negative
Cannot update lead time on a deactivated dish
Min prep lead days cannot be negative
Max prep lead days cannot be negative
Max lead days must be >= min lead days
Cannot mark a deactivated dish as seasonal
Reason is required when 86ing a dish
